item.title: snmpwalk
item.description: Return Everything .1 represents top of the OID tree. snmpwalk -v2c -cpublic <IP> .1 If name are not displayed properly, you could try adding -mALL to the command arguments.

item.title: Systemd Service Hardening
item.description: Create the user with $HOME at /run/<username> and configure RuntimeDirectory, so that systemd will create and chown the directory automatically.

item.title: Beancount and Fava
item.description: Fava Tips fava --read-only is supposedly less vulnerable to arbitrary file write, which is a feature of Fava (not a bug). Only accounts opened with fava-uptodate-indication: TRUE metadata are supposed to have up-to-date balance tracking (i.e.

item.title: npm user prefix and installing corepack
item.description: Configuring npm user prefix npm config -L user set prefix=${HOME}/.npm-packages Installing corepack # Resolve conflicts (if exists) npm uninstall -g yarn pnpm # Install corepack ...

item.title: Upgrading FreeBSD
item.description: freebsd-update freebsd-update is not meant to be run in parallel with the same workdir (-d). bootcode update If you have the good old MBR, try this to update the bootcode.

item.title: NetworkManager
item.description: Common Commands To list the currently available network connections: ~]$ nmcli con show NAME UUID TYPE DEVICE Auto Ethernet 9b7f2511-5432-40ae-b091-af2457dfd988 802-3-ethernet ...

item.title: Tailscale Exit Node
item.description: Exclude Routes To exclude routes from exit node on Tailscale’s route table, run the following command. ip route add throw 10.42.0.0/16 table 52 This could be added to ExecStartPost override in systemd unit files.
